prompt: generate a weather map displaying emotional climates across different regions, where storm clouds represent areas of sadness, sunny patches show joy, and rainbow bridges connect zones of hope
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed weather map depicting emotional climates across distinct geographical regions. In the upper-left area, render a prominent zone of sadness characterized by dark, swirling storm clouds. In the lower-right area, illustrate a region of joy with bright, clear blue skies and radiant sun icons. Between central landmasses, create vibrant rainbow bridges arcing to connect areas, symbolizing hope. The map should have a clear cartographic base with topographical features.
objects: dark, swirling storm clouds in the upper-left area
bright, clear blue skies in the lower-right area
radiant sun icons in the lower-right area
vibrant rainbow bridges arcing between central landmasses
